prestazioni: Engine: Ford Duratec V6 (code: **Ford Cyclone 3.0L V6 (Duratec 30)**) – Full forged internals upgrade with **Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Crower forged connecting rods**, and **JE custom billet crankshaft** for 1,000+ hp capability. Twin **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II** turbos with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegates** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** for optimized spool and response.

Fuel System: **FuelTech FT600 ECU** standalone management with **ID1000x injectors** and **AEM 400LPH in-tank fuel pump**, paired with a **Radium Engineering dual fuel pressure regulator** and **Fore Innovations surge tank** for high-G fuel delivery. **Methanol injection kit (Snow Performance Stage 3)** with dual **Devil’s Own D1 nozzles** for cooling and octane boost.

Drivetrain & Chassis: **Quaife ATB LSD** with **PPG 6-speed sequential gearbox (dog-ring upgrade)** and **Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch**. **Ohlins TTX40 coilovers** with **Eibach ERS springs (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear)** and **Noble-specific spherical bearing upper control arms** for camber/caster adjustability. **AP Racing 6-piston front (380mm) and 4-piston rear (355mm) big brake kit** with **Ferodo DS3000 pads** and **Goodridge braided stainless lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Noble-specific carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and ducktail spoiler) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** for track debris protection.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (OEM replacement with dual heat extractors) and **custom aluminum rear diffuser** (integrated **Aeromotions active rear wing** with **3-position angle adjustment**). **HRE FF01 wheels (19x10.5 ET25 front, 19x12 ET40 rear)** in **Gunmetal finish** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear)** for max grip.

**Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (door cards, dash, headliner) with **Sparco Pro 2000 seats (Noble-specific mounting brackets)** and **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **AiM MXS Strada dash logger** and **custom carbon fiber center console (housing **Motec PDM15** for power distribution).**
